metadata.description: Automatic escalation rules for dispatcher task execution failures

max_retries_before_escalate.description: Maximum number of local model retries before escalating to Worker agent

auto_escalate_type_d.description: Automatically escalate Type D failures (anti-pattern violations) to Worker agent

auto_escalate_on_timeout.description: Automatically escalate tasks that exceed timeout threshold

timeout_threshold_mins.description: Timeout threshold in minutes before escalating stalled tasks

syntax_error.description: Syntax errors can usually be fixed with self-correction

missing_context.description: Add referenced files to context and retry execution

model_hallucination.description: Hallucinations require human review - escalate immediately

file_not_found.description: Search for file using glob patterns before escalating

anti_pattern_violation.description: Anti-pattern violations require Worker agent with different approach

insufficient_permissions.description: Permission errors require human approval before retry

escalation_alert.description: Send alert when task is escalated to Worker agent

success_summary.description: Send summary when task completes successfully via retry

escalation_criteria.description: Task is escalated if failure matches any of these failure mode types
